verses.translationText: Indeed, it is a noble Qur'an
In a Register well-protected;
None touch it except the purified.
[It is] a revelation from the Lord of the worlds.
Then is it to this statement that you are indifferent
And make [the thanks for] your provision that you deny [the Provider]?
Then why, when the soul at death reaches the throat
And you are at that time looking on -

verses.arabicText: وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنكُمْ وَلَٰكِن لَّا تُبْصِرُونَ
verses.translationText: And Our angels are nearer to him than you, but you do not see -
Then why do you not, if you are not to be recompensed,
Bring it back, if you should be truthful?
And if the deceased was of those brought near to Allah,
Then [for him is] rest and bounty and a garden of pleasure.

verses.arabicText: وَأَمَّآ إِن كَانَ مِنْ أَصْحَٰبِ ٱلْيَمِينِ
verses.translationText: And if he was of the companions of the right,
Then [the angels will say], "Peace for you; [you are] from the companions of the right."

verses.arabicText: وَأَمَّآ إِن كَانَ مِنَ ٱلْمُكَذِّبِينَ ٱلضَّآلِّينَ
verses.translationText: But if he was of the deniers [who were] astray,
Then [for him is] accommodation of scalding water
And burning in Hellfire
Indeed, this is the true certainty,
So exalt the name of your Lord, the Most Great.

verses.arabicText: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ سَبَّحَ لِلَّهِ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۖ وَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ
verses.translationText: Whatever is in the heavens and earth exalts Allah, and He is the Exalted in Might, the Wise.

verses.arabicText: لَهُۥ مُلْكُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۖ يُحْىِۦ وَيُمِيتُ ۖ وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍۢ قَدِيرٌ
verses.translationText: His is the dominion of the heavens and earth. He gives life and causes death, and He is over all things competent.

verses.arabicText: هُوَ ٱلْأَوَّلُ وَٱلْءَاخِرُ وَٱلظَّٰهِرُ وَٱلْبَاطِنُ ۖ وَهُوَ بِكُلِّ شَىْءٍ عَلِيمٌ
verses.translationText: He is the First and the Last, the Ascendant and the Intimate, and He is, of all things, Knowing.
